headline: Sandisk Rockets 4000% on AI Memory Boom: Buy, Hold, or Take Profits?

headline: Super Micro Computer Spikes 9%, SanDisk Climbs 4% as the AI Infrastructure Trade Heats Up
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are up 9% on Thursday while SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) stock is rising 4%. The bid is broad rather than headline-driven, with the AI infrastructure trade gathering force into the close of May. Traders are leaning into the picks-and-shovels layer of the AI buildout today, with no fresh company-specific catalyst behind ... Super Micro Computer Spikes 9%, SanDisk Climbs 4% as the AI Infrastructure Trade Heats Up

headline: WD Appoints Manuvir Das to Board of Directors
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., May 28, 2026--Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), the storage foundation of the AI-driven data economy, today announced the appointment of Manuvir Das to its board of directors, effective May 26, 2026. Das previously held senior leadership roles at NVIDIA, Dell EMC, and Microsoft, and brings deep expertise in enterprise AI, data infrastructure, and cloud computing.
